languages.text: Вивисектор Мартинакс, оставшийся руководить хирургеонами Сектора Бионика, очень скоро обнаружил, что младшие медикарии отсека поддались ереси ксенотеха. Верховенство вивисектора было завершено тихим и быстрым отравлением, которое, по слухам, совершил его напарник генетор Ферренц.

Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, soon discovered that the bay's junior medicae officers had succumbed to the heresy of xenotech. The Vivisector's authority was ended by means of a quiet and swift poisoning, rumoured to have been perpetrated by his partner, Genetor Ferrenz.
languages.original_text: Вивисектор Мартинакс, оставшийся руководить хирургеонами Сектора Бионика, очень скоро обнаружил, что младшие медикарии отсека поддались ереси ксенотеха. Верховенство вивисектора было завершено тихим и быстрым отравлением, которое, по слухам, совершил его напарник генетор Ферренц.

traits.locale_text: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, soon discovered that the bay's junior medicae officers had succumbed to the heresy of xenotech. The Vivisector's authority was ended by means of a quiet and swift poisoning, rumoured to have been perpetrated by his partner, Genetor Ferrenz.

Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, soon discovered that the bay's junior medicae officers had succumbed to the heresy of xenotech. The Vivisector's authority was ended by means of a quiet and swift poisoning, rumoured to have been perpetrated by his partner, Genetor Ferrenz.

Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, soon discovered that the bay's junior medicae officers had succumbed to the heresy of xenotech. The Vivisector's authority was ended by means of a quiet and swift poisoning, rumoured to have been perpetrated by his partner, Genetor Ferrenz.

languages.text: バイオニカセクターの外科医長に任命されたマルタナスは、すぐに湾の若手医療官が異教の技術であるゼノテクノロジーに堕ちたと気づいた。マルタナスは、パートナーであるジェネトール・フェレンツによって毒殺されたと噂される静かで迅速な毒殺によって権限を剥奪された。
languages.original_text: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, soon discovered that the bay's junior medicae officers had succumbed to the heresy of xenotech. The Vivisector's authority was ended by means of a quiet and swift poisoning, rumoured to have been perpetrated by his partner, Genetor Ferrenz.

traits.locale_text: バイオニカセクターの外科医長に任命されたマルタナスは、すぐに湾の若手医療官が異教の技術であるゼノテクノロジーに堕ちたと気づいた。マルタナスは、パートナーであるジェネトール・フェレンツによって毒殺されたと噂される静かで迅速な毒殺によって権限を剥奪された。

languages.text: 解剖者马丁纳克斯被委任管理仿生区医务。他很快发现，舱区的低阶医务官们已堕入异形科技的泥潭。这位解剖者的权威被一场悄无声息的毒杀迅速终结——传闻正是他的搭档，基因士费伦茨下的手。
languages.original_text: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, soon discovered that the bay's junior medicae officers had succumbed to the heresy of xenotech. The Vivisector's authority was ended by means of a quiet and swift poisoning, rumoured to have been perpetrated by his partner, Genetor Ferrenz.

traits.locale_text: 解剖者马丁纳克斯被委任管理仿生区医务。他很快发现，舱区的低阶医务官们已堕入异形科技的泥潭。这位解剖者的权威被一场悄无声息的毒杀迅速终结——传闻正是他的搭档，基因士费伦茨下的手。

languages.text: Le vivisecteur Martinax, nommé responsable des chirurgeons du secteur Bionica, découvrit rapidement que les sous-officiers de medicae avaient succombé à l'hérésie de la xénotech, mais il succomba peu après à un empoisonnement aussi rapide que discret. Selon les rumeurs, le meurtre aurait été perpétré par son partenaire, le genetor Ferrenz.
languages.original_text: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, soon discovered that the bay's junior medicae officers had succumbed to the heresy of xenotech. The Vivisector's authority was ended by means of a quiet and swift poisoning, rumoured to have been perpetrated by his partner, Genetor Ferrenz.

traits.locale_text: Le vivisecteur Martinax, nommé responsable des chirurgeons du secteur Bionica, découvrit rapidement que les sous-officiers de medicae avaient succombé à l'hérésie de la xénotech, mais il succomba peu après à un empoisonnement aussi rapide que discret. Selon les rumeurs, le meurtre aurait été perpétré par son partenaire, le genetor Ferrenz.

languages.text: El vivisector Martinax, ahora al mando de los cirujanos del sector Bionica, pronto descubrió que los oficiales de medicae jóvenes de la bahía habían sucumbido a la herejía de la xenotecnología. La autoridad del vivisector acabó en un envenenamiento silencioso y rápido que, según los rumores, fue obra de su compañero, el genetor Ferrenz.
languages.original_text: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, soon discovered that the bay's junior medicae officers had succumbed to the heresy of xenotech. The Vivisector's authority was ended by means of a quiet and swift poisoning, rumoured to have been perpetrated by his partner, Genetor Ferrenz.

traits.locale_text: El vivisector Martinax, ahora al mando de los cirujanos del sector Bionica, pronto descubrió que los oficiales de medicae jóvenes de la bahía habían sucumbido a la herejía de la xenotecnología. La autoridad del vivisector acabó en un envenenamiento silencioso y rápido que, según los rumores, fue obra de su compañero, el genetor Ferrenz.

languages.text: Sektör Biyonika cerrahlarının sorumluluğuna bırakılan Dirikesimci Martinax, çok geçmeden revirin kıdemsiz sıhhiye subaylarının zeno teknolojisi kâfirliğine boyun eğdiğini keşfetti. Dirikesimci'nin otoritesi, söylentilere göre ortağı Genetör Ferrenz'ce gerçekleştirilen sessiz ve hızlı bir zehirlenme ile sona erdi.
languages.original_text: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, soon discovered that the bay's junior medicae officers had succumbed to the heresy of xenotech. The Vivisector's authority was ended by means of a quiet and swift poisoning, rumoured to have been perpetrated by his partner, Genetor Ferrenz.

traits.locale_text: Sektör Biyonika cerrahlarının sorumluluğuna bırakılan Dirikesimci Martinax, çok geçmeden revirin kıdemsiz sıhhiye subaylarının zeno teknolojisi kâfirliğine boyun eğdiğini keşfetti. Dirikesimci'nin otoritesi, söylentilere göre ortağı Genetör Ferrenz'ce gerçekleştirilen sessiz ve hızlı bir zehirlenme ile sona erdi.

languages.text: Vivisektor Martinax, der für die Chirurgeums des Sektors Bionica verantwortlich war, entdeckte bald, dass die jungen Medicae-Offiziere der Ketzerei der Xenotech erlegen waren. Die Autorität des Vivisektors fand mittels eines lautlosen Giftes ein rasches Ende, das ihm Gerüchten zufolge sein Partner, Genetor Ferrenz, verabreicht hatte.
languages.original_text: Vivisector Martinax, left in charge of the Sector Bionica's chirurgeons, soon discovered that the bay's junior medicae officers had succumbed to the heresy of xenotech. The Vivisector's authority was ended by means of a quiet and swift poisoning, rumoured to have been perpetrated by his partner, Genetor Ferrenz.

traits.locale_text: Vivisektor Martinax, der für die Chirurgeums des Sektors Bionica verantwortlich war, entdeckte bald, dass die jungen Medicae-Offiziere der Ketzerei der Xenotech erlegen waren. Die Autorität des Vivisektors fand mittels eines lautlosen Giftes ein rasches Ende, das ihm Gerüchten zufolge sein Partner, Genetor Ferrenz, verabreicht hatte.
